labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Unknown" provides 2 tools focused on development tools tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: clerk_sdk_snippet, list_clerk_sdk_snippets.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: code, sdk, snippet.

tools.description: Get Clerk SDK code snippets and patterns.

slug.description: SDK snippet slug (e.g. "use-user", "use-auth") OR bundle name (e.g. "b2b-saas", "organizations").
